# Jarvis Helpdesk - Mobile App API

## Docs
- Root [API Error Response ](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/api-error-response-2095382m0.md): 

## API Docs
- Root > 1. Account & Tenant > Notifications [Get notifications](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-notifications-32922546e0.md):

- Root > 3. Tickets > Comments [Add comment to ticket](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/add-comment-to-ticket-32922612e0.md): 
- Root > 3. Tickets > Comments [Get comment](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-comment-32922613e0.md): 
- Root > 3. Tickets > Comments [Delete comment](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/delete-comment-32922614e0.md): 
- Root > 3. Tickets > Tickets [Get all tickets](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-all-tickets-32922601e0.md): 
- Root > 3. Tickets > Tickets [Get tickets filtered by status](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-tickets-filtered-by-status-32922602e0.md): 
- Root > 3. Tickets > Tickets [Get my assigned tickets](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-my-assigned-tickets-32922603e0.md): 
- Root > 3. Tickets > Tickets [Get my tickets filtered by status](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-my-tickets-filtered-by-status-32922604e0.md):

- Root > 3. Tickets > Tickets [Get customer tickets](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-customer-tickets-32922608e0.md):

- Root > 2. Customers > CS Agents [Get CS agent list](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-cs-agent-list-32922615e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > CS Agents [Update CS agent info](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/update-cs-agent-info-32922616e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > CS Agents [Delete CS agent](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/delete-cs-agent-32922617e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > CS Agents [Upload CS avatar](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/upload-cs-avatar-32922618e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > CS Agents [Delete CS avatar](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/delete-cs-avatar-32922619e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > Customers [Get customer list](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-customer-list-32922620e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > Customers [Add customer](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/add-customer-32922621e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > Customers [Get customer details](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-customer-details-32922622e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > Customers [Check if email is valid / available](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/check-if-email-is-valid-available-32922623e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > Customers [Update customer](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/update-customer-32922624e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > Customers [Merge two customers](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/merge-two-customers-32922625e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > Customers [Add tag to customer](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/add-tag-to-customer-32922626e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > Customers [Remove tag from customer](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/remove-tag-from-customer-32922627e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > Customers [Add contact to customer](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/add-contact-to-customer-32922628e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > Customers [Delete customer contact](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/delete-customer-contact-32922629e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > Customers [Find and delete contact](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/find-and-delete-contact-32922630e0.md): 
- Root > 2. Customers > Tags [List tags](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/list-tags-34434586e0.md): List all tags for the authenticated user's tenant. Used to populate the tag picker on the customer detail screen and the tag filter on the customer list.
- Root > 2. Customers > Tags [Create tag](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/create-tag-34434587e0.md): Create a new tag for the authenticated user's tenant. Tag names must be unique within a tenant — duplicate names are rejected with status `EXISTED`.
- Root > 2. Customers > Tags [Update tag](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/update-tag-34434588e0.md): Update the display name of a tag. The tag must belong to the same tenant as the authenticated user — cross-tenant updates are rejected with `PERMISSION_DENIED`.
- Root > 2. Customers > Tags [Delete tag](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/delete-tag-34434589e0.md): Soft-delete a tag (paranoid). The tag must belong to the same tenant as the authenticated user. Deleting a tag does NOT remove it from existing customer-tag links — those join rows continue to reference the soft-deleted tag.
- Root > 8. Deprecated > Chat Rooms [Get chat room counter](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-chat-room-counter-32922631e0.md): 
- Root > 8. Deprecated > Chat Rooms [Get chat room list](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-chat-room-list-32922632e0.md): 
- Root > 8. Deprecated > Chat Rooms [Get chat room detail](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-chat-room-detail-32922633e0.md): 
- Root > 8. Deprecated > Chat Rooms [Mark chat room as seen](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/mark-chat-room-as-seen-32922634e0.md): 
- Root > 8. Deprecated > Chat Rooms [Analyze ticket in chat room (AI)](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/analyze-ticket-in-chat-room-ai-32922635e0.md): BE proxy → AI-Services POST /api/v1/ai-agents/{tenantId}/ticket-analyze
- Root > 8. Deprecated > Messages [Get message list](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-message-list-32922636e0.md): 
- Root > 8. Deprecated > Messages [Get newer messages (since last fetch)](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-newer-messages-since-last-fetch-32922637e0.md): 
- Root > 8. Deprecated > Messages [Send message from CS to customer](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/send-message-from-cs-to-customer-32922638e0.md): 
- Root > 8. Deprecated > Messages [Count search messages in chat room](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/count-search-messages-in-chat-room-32922639e0.md): 
- Root > 8. Deprecated > Messages [Search messages grouped by chat room](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/search-messages-grouped-by-chat-room-32922640e0.md): 
- Root > 8. Deprecated > Messages [Get flat search message list](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-flat-search-message-list-32922641e0.md): 
- Root > 8. Deprecated > Messages [React to message](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/react-to-message-32922642e0.md): 
- Root > 8. Deprecated > Messages [Remove reaction from message](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/remove-reaction-from-message-32922643e0.md): 
- Root > 5. AI > Draft Response [Generate AI draft response](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/generate-ai-draft-response-32922644e0.md): BE proxy → AI-Services POST /api/v1/ai-agents/{tenantId}/draft-response → Agentic pipeline
- Root > 5. AI > Draft Response [Stream AI draft response (SSE)](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/stream-ai-draft-response-sse-32922645e0.md): SSE stream. Events: `draftResponseProgress` (step updates), `lastDraftResponseUpdate` (final).
- Root > 5. AI > Draft Response [Send message to Jarvis AI Agent (sync)](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/send-message-to-jarvis-ai-agent-sync-32922646e0.md): BE proxy → AI-Services POST /api/v1/ai-agents/tenants/{tenantId}/jarvis-agent/message
- Root > 5. AI > Draft Response [Stream Jarvis AI Agent response (SSE)](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/stream-jarvis-ai-agent-response-sse-32922647e0.md): BE proxy → AI-Services POST /api/v1/ai-agents/tenants/{tenantId}/jarvis-agent/message/stream
- Root > 5. AI > Draft Response [Confirm or deny a HITL (Human-in-the-Loop) proposal](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/confirm-or-deny-a-hitl-human-in-the-loop-proposal-32922648e0.md): BE proxy → AI-Services POST /api/v1/ai-agents/tenants/{tenantId}/jarvis-agent/confirm
- Root > 5. AI > Agents [Get active AI agent by tenant](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-active-ai-agent-by-tenant-32922649e0.md): Retrieves the AI agent associated with the given tenant. **Auto-creates** a default agent (Casual tone, English) on first access if one does not yet exist — so this endpoint is idempotent and never returns 404 for a valid tenant.
- Root > 5. AI > Agents [Create AI agent for tenant](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/create-ai-agent-for-tenant-32922650e0.md): Creates a new AI agent for the given tenant with default configuration (`toneOfAI: Casual`, `language: English`, all auto-flags off) and seeds default rules and system sub-agents.
- Root > 5. AI > Agents [Update AI agent configuration](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/update-ai-agent-configuration-32922651e0.md): Partially updates the runtime configuration of the tenant's AI agent. Only the fields provided in the request body are merged into the existing `configs` JSONB column — omitted fields keep their current values.
- Root > 5. AI > Agents [Update AI agent configuration (by agent ID)](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/update-ai-agent-configuration-by-agent-id-32922652e0.md): 
- Root > 5. AI > Agents [Delete AI agent](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/delete-ai-agent-32922653e0.md): 
- Root > 5. AI > Agents [Update AI agent profile/information](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/update-ai-agent-profileinformation-32922654e0.md): 
- Root > 5. AI > Agents [Ask a question to the AI agent (playground/chat)](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/ask-a-question-to-the-ai-agent-playgroundchat-32922655e0.md): Used for playground chat testing and file-based Q&A (Section 8.1 & 13)
- Root > 5. AI > Agents [Chat completion using AI agent](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/chat-completion-using-ai-agent-32922656e0.md): 
- Root > 5. AI > Agents [Complete a prompt using AI agent](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/complete-a-prompt-using-ai-agent-32922657e0.md): 
- Root > 5. AI > Agents [Query AI agent knowledge base directly](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/query-ai-agent-knowledge-base-directly-32922658e0.md): 
- Root > 5. AI > Agents [Analyze website — suggest AI agent name + description](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/analyze-website-suggest-ai-agent-name-description-32922659e0.md): 
- Root > 5. AI > Agents [Generate rules and FAQ from website](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/generate-rules-and-faq-from-website-32922660e0.md): 
- Root > 5. AI > Agents [Generate FAQ questions from agent configuration](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/generate-faq-questions-from-agent-configuration-32922661e0.md): 
- Root > 5. AI > Agents [Generate personalized agent from industry template](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/generate-personalized-agent-from-industry-template-32922662e0.md): 
- Root > 5. AI > Agent Actions [Draft response using AI Agent](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/draft-response-using-ai-agent-32922663e0.md): 
- Root > 5. AI > Agent Actions [Stream draft response (SSE)](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/stream-draft-response-sse-32922664e0.md):

- Root > 5. AI > Agent Actions [Simplify words](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/simplify-words-32922672e0.md):

- Root > 4. Messaging Channels > Zalo [Get latest customer from Zalo](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-latest-customer-from-zalo-32922560e0.md): 
- Root > 4. Messaging Channels > Zalo [Get latest messages from Zalo](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-latest-messages-from-zalo-32922561e0.md): 
- Root > 4. Messaging Channels > Zalo [Get Zalo message detail](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-zalo-message-detail-32922562e0.md): 
- Root > 4. Messaging Channels > Zalo [Send Zalo personal message](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/send-zalo-personal-message-32922563e0.md): 
- Root > 4. Messaging Channels > Zalo [Get Zalo personal connection status](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-zalo-personal-connection-status-32922564e0.md): 
- Root > 4. Messaging Channels > Zalo [Connect Zalo personal account](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/connect-zalo-personal-account-32922565e0.md): 
- Root > 4. Messaging Channels > Zalo [Disconnect Zalo personal account](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/disconnect-zalo-personal-account-32922566e0.md): 
- Root > 4. Messaging Channels > Zalo [Get all Zalo personal connections](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-all-zalo-personal-connections-32922567e0.md): List all Zalo Personal channel instances managed by the BE process, along with their live runtime status (websocket / HTTP client readiness). Used by the Zalo settings page to show which personal accounts are currently connected.
- Root > 4. Messaging Channels > Zalo [Assign CS agent to Zalo personal](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/assign-cs-agent-to-zalo-personal-32922568e0.md): 
- Root > 4. Messaging Channels > Zalo [Unassign CS agent from Zalo personal](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/unassign-cs-agent-from-zalo-personal-32922569e0.md): 
- Root > 1a. Stack Auth — OAuth [Initiate Google OAuth flow (PKCE)](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/initiate-google-oauth-flow-pkce-32922530e0.md): Opens in Chrome Custom Tab on mobile. Redirects user to Google consent screen.
- Root > 1a. Stack Auth — OAuth [Exchange authorization code for tokens](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/exchange-authorization-code-for-tokens-32922531e0.md): After the OAuth callback delivers `code` to the app via deep link,
- Root > 1b. Stack Auth — OTP [Send OTP sign-in code to email](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/send-otp-sign-in-code-to-email-32922532e0.md): 
- Root > 1b. Stack Auth — OTP [Sign in with OTP code](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/sign-in-with-otp-code-32922533e0.md): 
- Root > 1c. Stack Auth — Session [Get current session details](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-current-session-details-32922534e0.md): 
- Root > 1c. Stack Auth — Session [Sign out (invalidate refresh token)](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/sign-out-invalidate-refresh-token-32922535e0.md): 
- Root > 1c. Stack Auth — Session [Refresh access token](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/refresh-access-token-32922536e0.md): 
- Root > 1d. Auth (Jarvis BE) [Validate Stack Auth token and get Jarvis user profile](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/validate-stack-auth-token-and-get-jarvis-user-profile-32922537e0.md): Called after obtaining a Stack Auth access token (via Google OAuth or Email OTP).
- Root > 1d. Auth (Jarvis BE) [Get current user profile](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-current-user-profile-32922538e0.md): 
- Root > 1d. Auth (Jarvis BE) [Update user profile](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/update-user-profile-32922539e0.md): 
- Root > 1d. Auth (Jarvis BE) [Upload user avatar](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/upload-user-avatar-32922540e0.md): 
- Root > 1d. Auth (Jarvis BE) [Remove user avatar](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/remove-user-avatar-32922541e0.md): 
- Root > 1d. Auth (Jarvis BE) [Get user's tenants](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-users-tenants-32922542e0.md): 
- Root > 1d. Auth (Jarvis BE) [Register device FCM token for push notifications](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/register-device-fcm-token-for-push-notifications-32922543e0.md): Called after successful login to enable push notifications
- Root > 1d. Auth (Jarvis BE) [Unregister device FCM token](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/unregister-device-fcm-token-32922544e0.md): Called on logout to stop push notifications
- Root > 1d. Auth (Jarvis BE) [Update last seen release note version](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/update-last-seen-release-note-version-32922545e0.md): 
- Root > ChatRoom [Get chat room counters](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-chat-room-counters-33819615e0.md): Returns ticket-status-based counters for chat rooms.
- Root > ChatRoom [Get chat room list](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-chat-room-list-33819616e0.md): Returns a paginated list of chat rooms with last message, customer info,
- Root > ChatRoom [Get chat room detail](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-chat-room-detail-33819617e0.md): Returns detailed chat room info. Query by `chatRoomID` (single room)
- Root > ChatRoom [Mark chat room as seen](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/mark-chat-room-as-seen-33819618e0.md): Marks a chat room as read up to a specific message. Broadcasts
- Root > ChatRoom [Analyze ticket in chat room (AI)](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/analyze-ticket-in-chat-room-ai-33819619e0.md): BE proxy -> AI-Services `POST /api/v1/ai-agents/{tenantId}/ticket-analyze`
- Root > Message [Get message list](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-message-list-33819620e0.md): Returns messages for a chat room with cursor-based pagination.
- Root > Message [Get newer messages (since a given message)](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/get-newer-messages-since-a-given-message-33819621e0.md): Fetches messages **newer** than `lastMessageID` (ascending order).
- Root > Message [Send message from agent to customer](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/send-message-from-agent-to-customer-33819622e0.md): Sends a message from a customer support agent to a customer.
- Root > Message [Count search results in a chat room](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/count-search-results-in-a-chat-room-33819623e0.md): 
- Root > Message [Search messages grouped by chat room](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/search-messages-grouped-by-chat-room-33819624e0.md): Returns search results grouped by chat room, useful for global search UI.
- Root > Message [Flat search message list](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/flat-search-message-list-33819625e0.md): Returns a flat list of messages matching the keyword, optionally scoped to a chat room.
- Root > Message [React to a message](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/react-to-a-message-33819626e0.md): Adds an emoji reaction to a message. Broadcasts `SOCKET_REACT_MESSAGE`
- Root > Message [Remove reaction from a message](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/remove-reaction-from-a-message-33819627e0.md): Removes an emoji reaction. Broadcasts `SOCKET_REACT_MESSAGE` update.
- Root > Message [Generate AI draft response](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/generate-ai-draft-response-33819628e0.md): BE proxy -> AI-Services. Returns a taskId for async processing.
- Root > Message [Stream AI draft response (SSE)](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/stream-ai-draft-response-sse-33819629e0.md): SSE stream for draft response generation.
- Root > WebSocket: Connection [Connect to Socket.io](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/connect-to-socket-io-33819630e0.md): **This is not an HTTP endpoint.** It documents the Socket.io connection.
- Root > WebSocket: Client Events [Authenticate socket connection](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/authenticate-socket-connection-33819631e0.md): **Client -> Server**. Must be emitted within 2 seconds of connection.
- Root > WebSocket: Client Events [Send typing indicator](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/send-typing-indicator-33819632e0.md): **Client -> Server**. Broadcasts to all other sockets in the namespace.
- Root > WebSocket: Client Events [Stop typing indicator](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/stop-typing-indicator-33819633e0.md): **Client -> Server**. Broadcasts stop-typing to all other sockets.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Messages [Generic new message](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/generic-new-message-33819634e0.md): **Server -> Client**. Generic message event.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Messages [Facebook Messenger message](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/facebook-messenger-message-33819635e0.md): **Server -> Client**. New message from Facebook Messenger channel.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Messages [Zalo message](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/zalo-message-33819636e0.md): **Server -> Client**. New message from Zalo channel.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Messages [Email message](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/email-message-33819637e0.md): **Server -> Client**. New message from email channel.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Messages [Phone/SMS message](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/phonesms-message-33819638e0.md): **Server -> Client**. New message from phone/SMS channel.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Messages [Lazada message](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/lazada-message-33819639e0.md): **Server -> Client**. New message from Lazada platform.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Messages [Lazada recalled message](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/lazada-recalled-message-33819640e0.md): **Server -> Client**. A Lazada message was recalled/deleted.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Messages [Zendesk message](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/zendesk-message-33819641e0.md): **Server -> Client**. New message from Zendesk integration.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Messages [Zoho Desk message](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/zoho-desk-message-33819642e0.md): **Server -> Client**. New message from Zoho Desk integration.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events ��� Messages [Web chat widget message](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/web-chat-widget-message-33819643e0.md): **Server -> Client**. New message from web chat widget.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Interactions [Agent typing indicator](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/agent-typing-indicator-33819644e0.md): **Server -> Client**. Another agent started typing.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Interactions [Agent stopped typing](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/agent-stopped-typing-33819645e0.md): **Server -> Client**. Another agent stopped typing.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Interactions [Customer typing indicator](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/customer-typing-indicator-33819646e0.md): **Server -> Client**. A customer started typing (from external channel).
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Interactions [Customer stopped typing](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/customer-stopped-typing-33819647e0.md): **Server -> Client**. A customer stopped typing.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Interactions [Chat room marked as seen](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/chat-room-marked-as-seen-33819648e0.md): **Server -> Client**. Another agent marked a chat room as read.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Interactions [Message reaction update](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/message-reaction-update-33819649e0.md): **Server -> Client**. A message reaction was added or removed.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Tickets & Notifications [Ticket status changed](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/ticket-status-changed-33819650e0.md): **Server -> Client**. A ticket's status was updated.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Tickets & Notifications [New ticket created](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/new-ticket-created-33819651e0.md): **Server -> Client**. A new ticket was created.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Tickets & Notifications [In-app notification](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/in-app-notification-33819652e0.md): **Server -> Client**. A new notification for the agent.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — Tickets & Notifications [Escalation alert](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/escalation-alert-33819653e0.md): **Server -> Client**. A conversation was escalated.
- Root > WebSocket: Server Events — AI [AI draft response progress](https://033thw3m9z.apidog.io/ai-draft-response-progress-33819654e0.md): **Server -> Client**. Progress update for AI draft response generation.
